title: leptoseris californica
intro: Leptoseris californica, also known as the California coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly found in the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Leptoseris californica include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
